description: Estate-as-container primitive: binds a controller_agent_id to a Keyring (Layer 2) and a lifecycle status. Foundation for the cycle-005 EstateTransition surface. State-machine validity is consumer-side per ADR-010.

estate_id.description: Stable opaque identifier for this estate (UUID v4).

controller_agent_id.description: The agent that controls this estate (signer-of-record).

keyring_id.description: FK to Keyring.keyring_id — the cryptographic-material container backing this estate. Hounfour does not dereference; the consumer resolves it.

status.description: Lifecycle vocabulary for AgentEstate. Five substrate-agnostic states: provisioning | active | paused | transferring | dissolved. State-machine validity is consumer-side per ADR-010.

anyOf.description: Estate is being set up; controller_agent_id + keyring_id are being bound.
Estate is in normal operation; controller may sign and act.
Estate signing is suspended; existing artifacts remain valid.
Estate is mid-transition to a new controller / keyring; intermediate state.
Estate is wound down; no further signing. Historical artifacts remain.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp at which the estate was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp at which the estate was last updated (status change, controller change).

contract_version.description: Hounfour contract version this estate was authored against.
